title: Prototype experiment
goal: Describe the product question this run must answer.
context: Provide only the context every run is allowed to share.
invariants:
- Same content and state
- Same viewport targets
- Same output contract
variant_assignment: Describe the one model, skill, prompt treatment, or approach assigned to this run.
deliverable: Create a self-contained prototype plus metadata and a run receipt.
evaluation_criteria:
- Prompt fidelity
- Primary-path clarity
- Viewport fit
- Interaction quality
